features.title: Improve Checkout Recovery
features.problem: 44 evidence item(s) indicate recurring checkout recovery friction. Returning shoppers lose cart or checkout state after an interruption and must repeat work. The account is high value, but its workflow is not representative of every shopper. Returning shoppers lose cart or checkout state after an interruption and must repeat work. The report is specific but does not establish how often the problem occurs.
features.hypothesis: If DailyCart improves checkout recovery, affected customers will complete their intended journey more reliably.

citations.title: Baseline signal: checkout completion rate
citations.supportingExcerpt: checkout completion rate changed by a material amount in the scenario window. Observational data cannot isolate product friction from traffic mix.

citations.title: Incident: Resilient checkout and cart recovery
citations.supportingExcerpt: A synthetic production incident affected resilient checkout and cart recovery. The postmortem distinguishes the trigger from broader customer claims.

features.title: Cart price-change transparency
features.problem: Customers lose confidence when cart totals change after returning to a saved session.
features.hypothesis: Showing an itemized price-change receipt will preserve trust and conversion.

features.title: Recommendation timeout isolation
features.problem: Recommendation latency can cascade into product-detail failures during peak traffic.
features.hypothesis: A strict timeout and fallback will protect core browsing reliability.

decisions.rationale: Strong triangulation across interviews, support, and funnel evidence.

tickets.title: Implement Improve Checkout Recovery core journey
tickets.description: Build the approved behavior described by PRD-0001 and preserve evidence-linked scope.
acceptanceCriteria: The primary improve checkout recovery journey completes in supported demo scenarios.

tickets.title: Instrument and harden Improve Checkout Recovery
tickets.description: Add telemetry, error handling, and deterministic regression coverage for PRD-0001.
acceptanceCriteria: Every outcome emits checkout_recovery_success_rate telemetry with a feature ID.
Critical deterministic and regression eval cases pass before release.

tickets.title: Integrate Improve Checkout Recovery and verify readiness
tickets.description: Combine the two independently executable workstreams and prepare the preview gate.
acceptanceCriteria: Both predecessor checks pass and the preview links to the approved feature.

incidents.title: Recovery analytics duplicated on mobile retry
incidents.rootCause: Retry instrumentation registered twice after viewport transition.
